description: Cnab Online is a service for processing CNAB return files and extracting file metadata, line-level field recognition, and occurrence information. Its published API is hosted at cnab-online.herokuapp.com under the /v1 base path.
summary: Cnab Online exposes one public HTTP REST API for uploading and parsing CNAB return files, documented by an OpenAPI/Swagger spec; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
